title: MikroTik wAP ax - outdoor access point
description: Compact access point ideal for busy public spaces and private properties. This dual-band access point supporting Wi-Fi 6 (802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax) offers significantly faster connections and higher security. The antenna for 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz has a gain of 7 dBi . The unit features a dual-core processor and MikroTik RouterOS v7 with L4 license . The device is equipped with two gigabit Ethernet ports, one of which is PoE-IN. Flexible power options include a standard DC connector (12-57 V) and active… wAP ax is weather-resistant and can be safely mounted on any wall, ceiling, or pole. There is a hole at the back of the case for routing the Ethernet cable directly through the wall Two gigabit RJ-45 ports Support for Wi-Fi 6 (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz) Wall, ceiling, or pole mounting Supports 2x2 MIMO Dual-core ARM processor and 256 MB RAM Supports PoE+ and DC power Device Power adapter (24 V / 0.8 A) Gigabit PoE injector Stand Mounting accessories Mounting clamp
